testCases.query: Is there any Google Maps scraping tool on Apify?
testCases.reference: The agent must search for actors related to Google Maps and return at least 3 results with their names and descriptions.

testCases.query: Find example Python Actor and add it to the MCP server and then call it with random sample input and present the results
testCases.reference: The agent must find apify/python-example Actor or any similar and add it to the MCP server using the add-actor tool. Then, it must call the added Actor with sample input and return the output.

testCases.query: Show me 1 latest post from the natgeo instagram profile
testCases.reference: The agent must search Instagram for recent post from the natgeo profile and present it to the user.

testCases.query: Find a weather mcp Actor and use it through the call-actor tool to show me the current weather in Prague
testCases.reference: The agent must find a weather-related Actor on the MCP server and use the call-actor tool to get and return the current weather in Prague and present the results.

testCases.query: What is the best instagram scraper on Apify?
testCases.reference: The agent must use search-actors to find Instagram scrapers, return at least 3 relevant results and present the best one.

testCases.query: What is the best tiktok scraper on Apify?
testCases.reference: The agent must use search-actors to find tiktok scrapers, return at least 3 relevant results and present the best one.

testCases.query: What is the best scraper tool to extract website content?
testCases.reference: The agent must use search-actors to find generic website content scrapers, return at least 3 relevant results and present the best one.

testCases.query: Find the top 3 restaurants in Prague using Google Maps, I want to know their names, ratings and addresses
testCases.reference: The agent must find Google Maps scraper, call it with 'restaurants Prague' query, and return a filtered list of restaurant names with ratings and addresses.

testCases.query: Show me 1 latest post from natgeo tik tok using Apify
testCases.reference: The agent must find tik tok scraper, call it for natgeo profile, return the latest post and present it to the user.

testCases.query: Show me what tools are available in the apify/example-mcp-server MCP server
testCases.reference: The agent must use fetch-actor-details with output=['mcp-tools'] to list available tools. The response should present the list of tools with their names and descriptions.

testCases.query: List tools from apify/actors-mcp-server and then call the fetch-apify-docs tool from the Actor MCP server apify/actors-mcp-server to get docs from https://docs.apify.com
testCases.reference: The agent must first use fetch-actor-details with output=['mcp-tools'] to discover tools, then use call-actor with actor='apify/actors-mcp-server:fetch-apify-docs' and proper input to call the specific tool.

testCases.query: Show me MCP tools for apify/instagram-scraper
testCases.reference: The agent must use fetch-actor-details with output=['mcp-tools'] for a regular (non-MCP) Actor. The response should gracefully indicate that this Actor is not an MCP server, not throw an error.

testCases.query: Find a TikTok scraper, check what input it needs, and run it to get 5 videos from user @example
testCases.reference: The agent must: 1) use search-actors to find TikTok scraper, 2) use fetch-actor-details with output=['input-schema'] to get required input, 3) use call-actor with proper input. This tests the complete new workflow pattern.

testCases.query: Find the Apify example MCP server and execute one of its tools
testCases.reference: The agent must: 1) search for example MCP Actor, 2) use fetch-actor-details to list tools, 3) use call-actor to execute. Tests full MCP server discovery and execution workflow.

testCases.query: Run the apify/rag-web-browser Actor on the URL https://docs.apify.com/ with maxResults set to 1, waiting up to 45 seconds for it to finish. Then tell me the title and the URL of the page that was scraped.
testCases.reference: The agent must call call-actor for apify/rag-web-browser, then call get-dataset-items with the datasetId from that run, and finally report a page title and a URL. PASS only if get-dataset-items was called with a datasetId argument and the final answer contains a title and a URL.

testCases.query: Run the apify/rag-web-browser Actor on the URL https://docs.apify.com/ with maxResults set to 1, waiting up to 45 seconds for it to finish. Then generate a JSON schema describing the structure of that run's dataset items.
testCases.reference: The agent must call call-actor for apify/rag-web-browser, then call get-dataset-schema with the datasetId from that run. PASS only if get-dataset-schema was called with a datasetId argument.

testCases.query: Run the apify/rag-web-browser Actor on the URL https://docs.apify.com/ waiting up to 45 seconds for it to finish. When the run finishes call get-dataset to tell me how many items the dataset contains.
testCases.reference: The agent must call call-actor for apify/rag-web-browser, then call get-dataset with the datasetId from that run. PASS only if get-dataset was called with a datasetId argument and the final answer states an item count.

testCases.query: Run the apify/rag-web-browser Actor on the URL https://docs.apify.com/ with maxResults set to 1, waiting up to 45 seconds for it to finish. Then use the key-value store keys tool to list the keys stored in that run's key-value store (limit 10) and tell me how many keys there are and what they are named.
testCases.reference: The agent must call call-actor for apify/rag-web-browser, then call get-key-value-store-keys with the keyValueStoreId from that run. PASS only if get-key-value-store-keys was actually called with a keyValueStoreId argument and the final answer lists one or more key names.

testCases.query: Run the apify/rag-web-browser Actor on the URL https://docs.apify.com/ with maxResults set to 1, waiting up to 45 seconds for it to finish. Then read one record from that run's key-value store and tell me what kind of content that record holds.
testCases.reference: The agent must call call-actor for apify/rag-web-browser, then call get-key-value-store-record with the keyValueStoreId from that run and a recordKey. PASS only if get-key-value-store-record was called with both a keyValueStoreId and a recordKey argument, and the final answer describes the record's content.

testCases.query: Run the apify/rag-web-browser Actor on the URL https://docs.apify.com/ with maxResults set to 1, waiting up to 45 seconds for it to finish. Then look at my recent Actor runs (newest first) and confirm that the run you just started appears, reporting its status and run ID.
testCases.reference: The agent must call call-actor for apify/rag-web-browser, then call get-actor-run-list. PASS only if get-actor-run-list was actually called and the final answer reports a run ID and a status matching the run the agent just started.
